news.title:
IRDAI approves transmission of 8.29 crore shares of late Rakesh Jhunjhunwala in Star Health.
Transmission to proceed post probate; disclosure made under SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
IRDAI approves transmission of 8.29 crore shares of late Rakesh Jhunjhunwala in Star Health.
Transmission to proceed post probate; disclosure made under SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Star Health's AA 'Stable' rating reaffirmed by Care Ratings for issuer and subordinate debt.
Disclosure complies with SEBI's LODR norms; details available on Star Health's website.
news.summary:
Star Health's AA 'Stable' rating reaffirmed by Care Ratings for issuer and subordinate debt.
Disclosure complies with SEBI's LODR norms; details available on Star Health's website.

news.title:
Star Health announces analyst/investor meetings on March 27, 2026, in Mumbai.
Scheduled meetings include Abakkus, Sageone, Singularity AMC, and Param Capital; link shared for presentation.
news.summary:
Star Health announces analyst/investor meetings on March 27, 2026, in Mumbai.
Scheduled meetings include Abakkus, Sageone, Singularity AMC, and Param Capital; link shared for presentation.

news.title:
Jefferies assigns Buy to Star Health with TP Rs 660, citing ~200bps loss ratio improvement by FY28.
Growth drivers include claims automation, hospital partnerships, PIR, and attractive 18x FY27E valuation.
news.summary:
Jefferies assigns Buy to Star Health with TP Rs 660, citing ~200bps loss ratio improvement by FY28.
Growth drivers include claims automation, hospital partnerships, PIR, and attractive 18x FY27E valuation.

news.title:
Star Health to hold analyst/institutional investor meetings on March 20, 2026, in Mumbai.
Sessions with SBI Life, Kotak AMC, and UTI MF scheduled; details on starhealth.in.
news.summary:
Star Health to hold analyst/institutional investor meetings on March 20, 2026, in Mumbai.
Sessions with SBI Life, Kotak AMC, and UTI MF scheduled; details on starhealth.in.

news.title:
Star Health Insurance reports 50% growth post GST removal on health insurance.
MD Anand Roy emphasizes need for healthcare regulation and discusses claims ratios.
news.summary:
Star Health Insurance reports 50% growth post GST removal on health insurance.
MD Anand Roy emphasizes need for healthcare regulation and discusses claims ratios.

news.title:
Star Health Insurance reports a 50% rise in new policy demand after GST removal.
The Chennai-based insurer saw this surge post the GST cut in September last year.
news.summary:
Star Health Insurance reports a 50% rise in new policy demand after GST removal.
The Chennai-based insurer saw this surge post the GST cut in September last year.

news.title:
Star Health has scheduled an analyst/investor meet on Feb 24, 2026, in Mumbai during Kotak Conference.
Participants include firms like Aditya Birla Sun Life, Kotak Portfolio, Morgan Stanley, and Temasek.
news.summary:
Star Health has scheduled an analyst/investor meet on Feb 24, 2026, in Mumbai during Kotak Conference.
Participants include firms like Aditya Birla Sun Life, Kotak Portfolio, Morgan Stanley, and Temasek.

news.title:
Star Health to hold Analyst/Investor Meet on Feb 10, 2026, in Chennai.
Meeting details, including presentation link, available on company's website.
news.summary:
Star Health to hold Analyst/Investor Meet on Feb 10, 2026, in Chennai.
Meeting details, including presentation link, available on company's website.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund sold 1.22 crore Star Health shares, reducing its stake by over 2%.
Post-sale, the fund's holding in Star Health stands at 3.1% of its paid-up capital.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund sold 1.22 crore Star Health shares, reducing its stake by over 2%.
Post-sale, the fund's holding in Star Health stands at 3.1% of its paid-up capital.

news.title:
Star Health seeks reclassification of Ebono Pvt Ltd and GS E Commerce to public shareholders.
Entities hold no shares; application submitted to BSE/NSE post board approval on Jan 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Star Health seeks reclassification of Ebono Pvt Ltd and GS E Commerce to public shareholders.
Entities hold no shares; application submitted to BSE/NSE post board approval on Jan 30, 2026.

news.title:
Star Health released the Q3 & 9M FY2026 earnings call audio recording.
The recording link was shared with BSE and NSE for investor reference.
news.summary:
Star Health released the Q3 & 9M FY2026 earnings call audio recording.
The recording link was shared with BSE and NSE for investor reference.

news.title:
Star Health's Q3 net profit fell to ₹1.3B from ₹2.15B YoY, missing ₹1.5B estimate.
Q3 revenue rose to ₹42.5B from ₹38B YoY, showing a positive growth trend.
news.summary:
Star Health's Q3 net profit fell to ₹1.3B from ₹2.15B YoY, missing ₹1.5B estimate.
Q3 revenue rose to ₹42.5B from ₹38B YoY, showing a positive growth trend.

news.title:
Star Health's Q3 FY26 PAT surged 414% YOY to ₹449 Cr; GWP grew 23% YOY to ₹5,047 Cr.
Combined ratio improved 317 bps to 98.9%; 76% premiums were collected digitally.
news.summary:
Star Health's Q3 FY26 PAT surged 414% YOY to ₹449 Cr; GWP grew 23% YOY to ₹5,047 Cr.
Combined ratio improved 317 bps to 98.9%; 76% premiums were collected digitally.

news.title:
Star Health's board approved unaudited Q3 and 9M financials for Dec 31, 2025.
Reclassification of 2 promoter entities to public proposed; audit found no material misstatements.
news.summary:
Star Health's board approved unaudited Q3 and 9M financials for Dec 31, 2025.
Reclassification of 2 promoter entities to public proposed; audit found no material misstatements.

news.title: Star Health's December insurance premium rose 24% YoY.
news.summary: Star Health's December insurance premium rose 24% YoY.

news.title:
Star Health fined Rs. 1.07 crore by GST authorities for excess ITC claimed in FY20.
Company plans to appeal, expects no material impact; legal counsel sees low liability risk.
news.summary:
Star Health fined Rs. 1.07 crore by GST authorities for excess ITC claimed in FY20.
Company plans to appeal, expects no material impact; legal counsel sees low liability risk.

news.title:
Star Health executed an NSE block trade of ~1,800,766 shares at Rs. 474.1.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 85.37 crores.
news.summary:
Star Health executed an NSE block trade of ~1,800,766 shares at Rs. 474.1.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 85.37 crores.

Meeting details and presentation link are available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Star Health announces an Analyst/Investor meet on Dec 1, 2025, in New York.

news.title:
Star Health to host a group meet with analysts/investors on Nov 18, 2025, at Mumbai during Avendus Spark Conference.
Participants include Axis MF, Rare Enterprise, Mirae MF, ICICI Prudential Life, Tata AMC, among others; presentation available online.
news.summary:
